description: Style NotePerfect for style and comfort, this shirt from spykar is sure to quickly elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, it offers exemplary comfort. Team it with formal pants and leather shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and suede shoes for a semi-formal touch.Product DetailsBlue shirt with a tipped collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, embroidered branding on the left chest and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with warm water using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
